title: San Francisco orders Apple, Google to remove nudify apps from app stores
summary: This week, San Francisco’s attorney general, David Chiu, sent cease-and-desist letters, demanding that Apple and Google remove 13 so-called nudification apps from their app stores, Wired reported. No apps were named in the report to “avoid pushing people toward them,” Wired said.
